message:
fix: hero video layout, inline noise texture, and tweet wall refinements

Video/layout:
- Remove padding and aspect-ratio constraints from hero video container,
  letting the video display at its natural dimensions (w-full h-auto)
- Add trimmed CRT hero video variant (frankentui-rio-crt-trimmed.webm)
- Minor video-player.tsx adjustment for the new layout

CSS:
- Replace external Cloudinary noise texture URL in globals.css with an
  inline SVG data URI to eliminate external CDN dependency and potential
  404 errors

Homepage:
- Tweak "From the Author" quote styling — larger text, italic, lighter
  color for improved readability and visual hierarchy

Tweet wall:
- Component refinements for display consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
